title: aethionema saxatile subsp. thomasianum
intro: Aethionema saxatile subsp. thomasianum, also known as the rock cress, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It is native to the Mediterranean region and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Aethionema saxatile subsp. thomasianum include reducing inflammation and fighting off infections, as well as potentially aiding in the treatment of various digestive issues and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
